title: 每天早上9点给我推送新闻
summary:
本次对话围绕“帮我整理一下桌面”展开。
最近一次助手回复摘要：macOS 的隐私保护限制了 launchd 对桌面的写入权限。我来调整脚本，将数据文件放到不受限的位置：

好的，我来帮你系统整理桌面。目前的桌面情况已经看清楚了：

**现有文件夹：**
- `Projects/`、`SuperAgent/`、`SearchAgent-Zero/`、`AgoraAI/`、`BlackBull-AI/`、`agent/`、`agentville/`、`agent应聘/`、`dataprocess/` — 项目相关
- `Data/` — 已有数据文件
- `Images/` — 图片文件夹
- `Apps/` — 应用
- `Logs/` — 日志
- `Misc/`、`123/` — 空文件夹

**散落的文件：**
- 4 个 CSV 数据文件 → 应移入 `Data/`
- 7 张截屏 PNG → 应移入 `Images/`

### 整理后的桌面结构（共 17 个项目，无散乱文件）：

好的，我来帮你创建一个 macOS 每日 9 点新闻推送的自动化方案，使用系统自带的 `launchd` 定时任务 + macOS 通知。

function.name: run_command
function.arguments:
{"command": "cat << 'SCRIPT' > ~/Desktop/news_push.sh
#!/bin/bash

# ============================================
# 每日新闻推送脚本 - 每天早上9点执行
# ============================================

LOG_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/news_log.txt"
echo "===== $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 方案1: 用 curl 抓取 Google News RSS (中文)
NEWS=$(curl -s --max-time 15 "https://news.google.com/rss?hl=zh-CN&gl=CN&ceid=CN:zh-Hans" 2>/dev/null | \
  grep -oP '<title>\K[^<]+' | \
  grep -v '^Google 新闻$' | \
  head -10)

if [ -z "$NEWS" ]; then
  # 备用方案: 抓取百度新闻热搜
  NEWS=$(curl -s --max-time 15 "https://top.baidu.com/board?tab=realtime" 2>/dev/null | \
    grep -oP 'class="title-[^"]*"[^>]*>\K[^<]+' | head -10)
fi

if [ -z "$NEWS" ]; then
  # 备用方案2: 用 python 抓取
  NEWS=$(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen('https://news.google.com/rss?hl=zh-CN&gl=CN&ceid=CN:zh-Hans', timeout=10)
    root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
    items = root.findall('.//item')
    for item in items[:10]:
        title = item.find('title')
        if title is not None and title.text != 'Google 新闻':
            print(title.text)
except:
    print('新闻获取失败')
" 2>/dev/null)
fi

# 写入日志
echo "$NEWS" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 显示 macOS 通知（仅保留前几条，通知栏显示有限）
NOTIFY_TEXT=$(echo "$NEWS" | head -5)
if [ -n "$NOTIFY_TEXT" ]; then
  /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"$(echo "$NOTIFY_TEXT" | tr '\n' '\\\\n' | sed 's/"/\\\\"/g')\" with title \"📰 每日新闻推送\" subtitle \"$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')\" sound name \"default\""
fi

# 同时写入桌面文件方便查看
echo "$NEWS" > "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
SCRIPT
chmod +x ~/Desktop/news_push.sh"}

function.arguments:
{"path": "/Users/a1021500689/Desktop/news_push.sh", "content": "#!/bin/bash

# ============================================
# 每日新闻推送脚本 - 每天早上9点执行
# ============================================

LOG_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/news_log.txt"
echo "===== $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 用 Python 抓取 Google News RSS
NEWS=$(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, sys
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen('https://news.google.com/rss?hl=zh-CN&gl=CN&ceid=CN:zh-Hans', timeout=10)
    root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
    items = root.findall('.//item')
    count = 0
    for item in items:
        title = item.find('title')
        if title is not None and title.text and title.text != 'Google 新闻':
            print(title.text)
            count += 1
            if count >= 10:
                break
except Exception as e:
    print('新闻获取失败: ' + str(e))
" 2>/dev/null)

if [ -z "$NEWS" ] || [ "$NEWS" = "新闻获取失败"* ]; then
    NEWS=$(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, json, re, sys
try:
    # 尝试从 NewsAPI 公共源获取（不需要 key 的备用方案）
    req = urllib.request.Request('https://news.google.com/rss?hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en')
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
    import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
    root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
    items = root.findall('.//item')
    count = 0
    for item in items:
        title = item.find('title')
        if title is not None and title.text and len(title.text) > 5:
            print(title.text)
            count += 1
            if count >= 10:
                break
except:
    print('新闻获取失败')
" 2>/dev/null)
fi

# 写入日志
echo "$NEWS" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 写入桌面文件
echo "📰 每日新闻 ($(date '+%Y-%m-%d'))" > "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
echo "================================" >> "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
echo "$NEWS" >> "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"

# 用 osascript 弹出通知（逐条处理避免引号问题）
echo "$NEWS" | while IFS= read -r line; do
    [ -z "$line" ] && continue
    /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"$line\" with title \"📰 每日新闻\" subtitle \"$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')\""
    sleep 0.3
done
"}

#!/bin/bash

# ============================================
# 每日新闻推送脚本 - 每天早上9点执行
# ============================================

LOG_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/news_log.txt"
echo "===== $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 用 Python 抓取 Google News RSS
NEWS=$(python3 -c "
import urllib.request, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
try:
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen('https://news.google.com/rss?hl=zh-CN&gl=CN&ceid=CN:zh-Hans', timeout=10)
    root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
    items = root.findall('.//item')
    count = 0
    for item in items:
        title = item.find('title')
        if title is not None and title.text and title.text != 'Google \u65b0\u95fb':
            print(title.text)
            count += 1
            if count >= 10:
                break
except Exception as e:
    print('\u65b0\u95fb\u83b7\u53d6\u5931\u8d25: ' + str(e))
" 2>/dev/null)

# 写入日志
echo "$NEWS" >> "$LOG_FILE"
echo "" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 写入桌面文件
echo "📰 每日新闻 ($(date '+%Y-%m-%d'))" > "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
echo "================================" >> "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
echo "$NEWS" >> "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
echo "" >> "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"
echo "📁 历史记录: $LOG_FILE" >> "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"

# 用 osascript 弹出 Mac 通知
if [ -n "$NEWS" ]; then
    FIRST_LINE=$(echo "$NEWS" | head -1)
    /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"$FIRST_LINE\" with title \"📰 每日新闻推送\" subtitle \"$(date '+%Y-%m-%d') — 共 $(echo "$NEWS" | wc -l | tr -d ' ') 条\" sound name \"default\""
fi
SCRIPT
chmod +x ~/Desktop/news_push.sh"}

好，现在重写一个更健壮的脚本，支持多新闻源：

function.name: run_command
function.arguments:
{"command": "cat > ~/Desktop/news_push.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

# ============================================
# 每日新闻推送脚本 - 每天早上9点执行
# ============================================

LOG_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/news_log.txt"
NEWS_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"

echo "===== $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 用 Python 多源抓取新闻
python3 << 'PYEOF' >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>&1
import urllib.request, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, ssl, sys

ssl._create_default_https_context = ssl._create_unverified_context

sources = [
    ("🌐 国际新闻 (BBC)", "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/world/rss.xml"),
    ("🇨🇳 中文新闻 (BBC中文)", "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/zhongwen/simp/rss.xml"),
    ("💻 科技 (Hacker News)", "https://hnrss.org/frontpage"),
]

results = []
for label, url in sources:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0"})
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
        root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
        items = root.findall('.//item')
        titles = []
        for item in items[:5]:
            title = item.find('title')
            if title is not None and title.text and len(title.text) > 3:
                titles.append(title.text.strip())
        if titles:
            results.append((label, titles))
    except Exception as e:
        pass

# 写桌面文件
with open("$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(f"📰 每日新闻推送 — $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %A')\n")
    f.write("=" * 50 + "\n\n")
    for label, titles in results:
        f.write(f"{label}\n")
        f.write("-" * 30 + "\n")
        for i, t in enumerate(titles, 1):
            f.write(f"  {i}. {t}\n")
        f.write("\n")
    f.write(f"📁 历史日志: $HOME/Desktop/news_log.txt\n")

# 输出用于通知的摘要
for label, titles in results:
    print(f"\n{label}")
    for t in titles[:3]:
        print(f"  • {t}")
PYEOF

# 读取结果用于通知
SUMMARY=$(tail -30 "$LOG_FILE" | grep -E '^(🌐|🇨🇳|💻|  • )' | head -10)

# 写入干净版本到桌面文件
python3 << 'PYEOF2'
import os, re
home = os.path.expanduser("~")
log_file = os.path.join(home, "Desktop/news_log.txt")
news_file = os.path.join(home, "Desktop/今日新闻.txt")

with open(log_file, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    content = f.read()

# 提取最后一次运行的结果
parts = content.strip().split("=====")
last_run = parts[-1] if parts else ""

# 提取新闻部分
lines = last_run.split("\n")
news_lines = [l for l in lines if l.startswith(("🌐", "🇨🇳", "💻", "  •"))]

if news_lines:
    with open(news_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("📰 每日新闻推送\n")
        f.write(f"{'='*40}\n\n")
        for l in news_lines:
            f.write(l + "\n")
        f.write(f"\n📁 日志: {log_file}\n")
PYEOF2

# 显示 macOS 通知 (仅显示前3条概要)
NOTIFY_TEXT=$(grep -E '  •' "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt" | head -5)
NOTIFY_COUNT=$(wc -l < "$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt")

if [ -n "$NOTIFY_TEXT" ]; then
    FIRST=$(echo "$NOTIFY_TEXT" | head -1 | sed 's/  • //')
    /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"$FIRST\" with title \"📰 每日新闻已送达\" subtitle \"$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')\" sound name \"default\""
fi

echo "✅ 新闻已更新: $NEWS_FILE"
SCRIPT
chmod +x ~/Desktop/news_push.sh"}

function.name: run_command
function.arguments:
{"command": "cat > ~/Desktop/news_push.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

# ============================================
# 每日新闻推送脚本 - 每天早上9点执行
# ============================================

LOG_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/news_log.txt"
NEWS_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"

echo "===== $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE"

# 用 Python 多源抓取新闻并写入文件
python3 << 'PYEOF' 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
import urllib.request, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, ssl, os
from datetime import datetime

ssl._create_default_https_context = ssl._create_unverified_context
home = os.path.expanduser("~")

sources = [
    ("🌐 国际新闻 (BBC)", "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/world/rss.xml"),
    ("🇨🇳 中文新闻 (BBC中文)", "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/zhongwen/simp/rss.xml"),
    ("💻 科技 (Hacker News)", "https://hnrss.org/frontpage"),
]

results = []
for label, url in sources:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0"})
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
        root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
        items = root.findall('.//item')
        titles = []
        for item in items[:5]:
            title = item.find('title')
            if title is not None and title.text and len(title.text) > 3:
                titles.append(title.text.strip())
        if titles:
            results.append((label, titles))
    except Exception as e:
        pass

# 写桌面新闻文件
news_file = os.path.join(home, "Desktop/今日新闻.txt")
with open(news_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(f"📰 每日新闻推送 — {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %A')}\n")
    f.write("=" * 50 + "\n\n")
    for label, titles in results:
        f.write(f"{label}\n")
        f.write("-" * 30 + "\n")
        for i, t in enumerate(titles, 1):
            f.write(f"  {i}. {t}\n")
        f.write("\n")

# 同时输出到日志
for label, titles in results:
    print(f"\n{label}")
    for t in titles[:3]:
        print(f"  \u2022 {t}")
PYEOF

# 显示 macOS 通知
NOTIFY_TEXT=$(grep -E '^\s+•' "$NEWS_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -3)

if [ -n "$NOTIFY_TEXT" ]; then
    FIRST=$(echo "$NOTIFY_TEXT" | head -1 | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*•[[:space:]]*//')
    /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"${FIRST}\" with title \"📰 每日新闻已送达\" subtitle \"$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')\" sound name \"default\""
fi

echo "✅ 新闻已更新: $NEWS_FILE"
SCRIPT
chmod +x ~/Desktop/news_push.sh"}

macOS 的隐私保护限制了 launchd 对桌面的写入权限。我来调整脚本，将数据文件放到不受限的位置：

function.name: run_command
function.arguments:
{"command": "cat > ~/Library/Scripts/news_push.sh << 'SCRIPT'
#!/bin/bash

# ============================================
# 每日新闻推送脚本 - 每天早上9点执行
# ============================================

LOG_FILE="$HOME/Library/Scripts/news_log.txt"
NEWS_FILE="$HOME/Library/Scripts/今日新闻.txt"
DEST_FILE="$HOME/Desktop/今日新闻.txt"

echo "===== $(date) =====" >> "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null

# 用 Python 多源抓取新闻并写入文件
python3 << 'PYEOF' 2>> "$LOG_FILE"
import urllib.request, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET, ssl, os
from datetime import datetime

ssl._create_default_https_context = ssl._create_unverified_context
home = os.path.expanduser("~")

sources = [
    ("🌐 国际新闻 (BBC)", "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/world/rss.xml"),
    ("🇨🇳 中文新闻 (BBC中文)", "https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/zhongwen/simp/rss.xml"),
    ("💻 科技 (Hacker News)", "https://hnrss.org/frontpage"),
]

results = []
for label, url in sources:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers={"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0"})
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
        root = ET.fromstring(resp.read())
        items = root.findall('.//item')
        titles = []
        for item in items[:5]:
            title = item.find('title')
            if title is not None and title.text and len(title.text) > 3:
                titles.append(title.text.strip())
        if titles:
            results.append((label, titles))
    except Exception as e:
        pass

# 写入脚本目录下的新闻文件
script_dir = os.path.join(home, "Library/Scripts")
news_file = os.path.join(script_dir, "今日新闻.txt")
lines = []
lines.append(f"📰 每日新闻推送 — {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %A')}")
lines.append("=" * 50)
lines.append("")
for label, titles in results:
    lines.append(f"{label}")
    lines.append("-" * 30)
    for i, t in enumerate(titles, 1):
        lines.append(f"  {i}. {t}")
    lines.append("")

with open(news_file, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(lines))

# 同时也尝试写入桌面（忽略失败）
try:
    dest = os.path.join(home, "Desktop/今日新闻.txt")
    with open(dest, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write("\n".join(lines))
except:
    pass

# 输出摘要到日志
for label, titles in results:
    print(f"\n{label}")
    for t in titles[:3]:
        print(f"  \u2022 {t}")
PYEOF

# 显示 macOS 通知（使用 osascript - 不受文件权限限制）
NOTIFY_TEXT=$(grep -E '^\s+[0-9]+\.' "$NEWS_FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -3)

if [ -n "$NOTIFY_TEXT" ]; then
    FIRST=$(echo "$NOTIFY_TEXT" | head -1 | sed 's/^[[:space:]]*[0-9]*\.*[[:space:]]*//')
    /usr/bin/osascript -e "display notification \"${FIRST}\" with title \"📰 每日新闻已送达\" subtitle \"$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')\" sound name \"default\""
fi

echo "✅ 新闻已更新"
SCRIPT
chmod 755 ~/Library/Scripts/news_push.sh"}
